race.description: Carlton & United Breweries Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: TOUGH AS STONE (7) was well in the market on debut when holding a forward position to run fourth at this track and trip. Gets map favours again with a host of gear changes. Shapes as the main danger. SIYAASI (5) covered ground on debut with an even fifth over 1000m at this track. Gets a better set-up now and capable of taking this out. DISTANT STRIPES (1) was much better last start when finishing off nicely into the placings at Albury. Draws to go back again but gets in well at the weights with the 3kg claimer engaged and should should be warming again late. HEART BALM (3) returns and looks best of the rest.
